case_title: KHALID MASOOD VS. CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASOOD, KHALID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO $1,188.82 PRINCIPAL, $53.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,241.82, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2377.64 AND ALLOCATES 50% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,377.64 FILED BY MASOOD, KHALID AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MASOOD, KHALID
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED MAR-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2010 BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (506).
